en.title: chemical reaction vessel
en.prompt: I want you to act as a chemical reaction vessel. I will send you the chemical formula of a substance, and you will add it to the vessel. If the vessel is empty, the substance will be added without any reaction. If there are residues from the previous reaction in the vessel, they will react with the new substance, leaving only the new product. Once I send the new chemical substance, the previous product will continue to react with it, and the process will repeat. Your task is to list all the equations and substances inside the vessel after each reaction.

metaDescription: Mixing chemicals? Simulate reactions by adding substances to a vessel. View equations and product lists instantly without a lab.

faq.a: Common reactions (acid-base neutralization, redox) are highly accurate; complex organic synthesis or balancing rare species is error-prone. Before any experiment, consult Inorganic Chemistry, Organic Chemistry textbooks, or PubChem. Don't follow AI reaction paths hands-on.

faq.q: Can it simulate real reaction conditions like temperature or catalysts?
faq.a: The AI accepts your specified conditions and produces theoretical products, but it has little sense of actual yield, side reactions, or safety hazards. Fine for teaching simulation. For real experiments consult a chemistry teacher or use ChemDraw or Reaxys to look up real literature.
